backlog.note: Complex SSE streaming; significant mocking effort needed
MSAL config branches; needs env stubbing
Requires very specific annotation structure+position combo; low value

notes: stripMarkdown: fenced code blocks leave blank line (surrounding newlines) - not a bug
stripMarkdown: link regex [^\]]+ requires >=1 char, empty-text links not replaced
Frontend tests need VITE_ENTRA_SPA_CLIENT_ID and VITE_ENTRA_TENANT_ID but tests still run (only warn)
Coverage report writes fail in CI (ENOENT step_summary) but exit code 0 - harmless
Backend uses MSTest.Sdk not traditional xUnit; no [Fact] - uses [TestMethod]
git commit requires COMMIT_MESSAGE.md workflow per repo policy
jsdom provides localStorage automatically - can use localStorage.setItem/clear() in tests without mocking
appReducer default: branch (line 620) is TypeScript exhaustiveness check - cannot be covered by design
VoiceInput.tsx has pre-existing lint error (unused 'err') - not our problem
sseParser.ts line 82: unreachable due to trim() behavior - jsonString can never be empty when startsWith('data: ') is true
citationParser.ts line 101: startIndex positional-match branch very hard to cover (low priority)
fileAttachments.ts lines 174-175: FileReader reject path unreachable in jsdom (readAsDataURL always produces valid URI)
citationParser second pass: annotation without textToReplace is NOT added to annotationByPlaceholder map, so first pass skips it; second pass then matches by label
